9774334739","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的情节太精彩了！当我读到末世来临时，我就想起了自己的亲朋好友，想象如果我们也身处那样的环境中，会怎样应对。书中角色的冷静和果敢真的很让人佩服，特别是女主，在面对丧尸时毫不畏惧，让我联想到了生活中那些坚强的妈妈们。这本书很值得一读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715997178,"group_id":"7224072090008161280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+6ZDl38L7HHd5EC32Y9iGEkyLwbXSC+NbMzOMUPkMuw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3600273967425001","user_name":"爱吃黑胡椒汁的星罗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3600273967425001","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7224072090008161280","book_info":{"abstract":"当末世来临，人类面临灭绝的时候，冷酷的她挥起屠刀，势必要打出一片天地。
